title: Device Home Screen - No Device connected - Supported List - Onboarding
scenario: Onboarding section device cards display correct information when tapped from Supported devices screen with no device connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is currently connected.
3. Tap the 'Supported devices' button on the Home screen.
4. In the Onboarding section, tap on the first listed device.
5. Observe the onboarding information displayed for that device.
6. Return to the Supported devices list.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 for each device listed under the Onboarding section.
expected: Each device tapped under the Onboarding section displays the correct onboarding information specific to that device (e.g., pairing instructions, feature highlights, setup steps).
